section.heading: Cost sharing

content.p: The costs of carrying out projects and activities under this subchapter shall be shared in accordance with section 16352 of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 109–58, title VIII, § 820, formerly § 815, Aug. 8, 2005, 119 Stat. 855; renumbered § 820, Pub. L. 117–58, div. D, title III, § 40314(1), Nov. 15, 2021, 135 Stat. 1008.)
